LightningComponentBundle.description: B2B Commerce storefront invoice detail view. Reads the invoiceId URL param, shows account/order info and the amount breakdown for a single Invoice__c record scoped to the logged-in user's account.

property.name: heading
property.label: Heading
property.description: Eyebrow label shown above the invoice number.

property.name: currencyCode
property.label: Currency code
property.description: ISO currency code used to format amounts.

property.name: backPageApiName
property.label: Invoice list page API name
property.description: API name of the community page hosting the invoice list. Used by the 'Back to invoices' link. Leave blank to use browser back.
